title: Lock hosted claim boundary
rationale: Hosted admission/read surfaces must not imply mutation authority, production operation, payment management, custody, settlement, or compliance audit.
acceptance: Forbidden hosted claims are enumerated
Permitted claim is limited to exact protected-call admission and redacted tenant-scoped reads
Tier 1 kernel language remains unchanged

title: Add explicit deployment-mode hosted admission config
rationale: Hosted behavior must not run from inferred authority defaults.
acceptance: deploymentMode supports local-dev test preview production
Hosted routes fail closed when required config is missing
Verifier strategy freshness roles scopes and tenant source are explicit

title: Prove admission happens before body parse and kernel invocation
rationale: The hosted seam is only meaningful if unadmitted requests cannot reach body trust or kernel state.
acceptance: Role freshness scope and tenant checks run before body parsing
Rejected requests leave refusal/proof-gap evidence as appropriate
Tests fail if parser or kernel is invoked before admission

title: Split transition admission from evidence read entitlement
rationale: A caller admitted to submit a transition must not automatically read evidence.
acceptance: Read roles viewer auditor operator rawEvidenceReader are modeled
Read scopes are exact and separate from admission scopes
Tenant org project predicates gate every read

title: Make evidence read denial oracle-safe
rationale: Missing-vs-cross-tenant distinctions can leak evidence existence.
acceptance: Unauthorized and missing reads share safe denial shape
Logs/receipts preserve internal reason without leaking to caller
Read matrix covers same-tenant cross-tenant missing and malformed ids

title: Define redacted evidence response contract
rationale: Redacted evidence must be a typed contract, not ad hoc response shaping.
acceptance: Redacted reads accept exact receipt/evidence id only
Response distinguishes stored redacted unavailable refused and proof-gap fields
Tokens headers emails cookies and payment hints are excluded or redacted

title: Harden rawReadPosture
rationale: Raw evidence is the highest-leakage surface and must not be controlled by convention.
acceptance: States unavailable disabled gated allowed are enforced
Raw reads require explicit role scope purpose time bound and audit when gated/allowed
Default posture blocks raw reads

title: Codify D1 authoritative and KV non-authoritative storage posture
rationale: KV must not become authoritative evidence storage without explicit consistency/audit limits.
acceptance: D1 owns structured evidence indexes and records
KV usage is documented and tested as non-authoritative
Storage contract rejects promoted mode without D1 binding proof

title: Add hosted readiness posture probe
rationale: Readiness must report enforcement posture, not process liveness or marketing readiness.
acceptance: Readiness reports mode bindings secrets names/presence vars local-vs-remote D1 migration schema verifier redaction retention export
Readiness states include active configured_but_unverified missing disabled read_only not_promoted
Secret values are never emitted

title: Add retention export and support-bundle posture
rationale: Audit-safe reads need explicit lifecycle and export limits without compliance theatre.
acceptance: Retention classes are explicit
Export requires exact scope and creates receipt/proof-gap evidence
Support bundle is redacted only

title: Add product-level redaction fuzzing and read matrices
rationale: Redaction safety and entitlement safety need adversarial tests, not snapshot confidence.
acceptance: Fuzz cases include tokens headers emails authorization strings cookies payment hints provider metadata
Read matrix covers roles scopes tenants orgs projects raw posture and missing records
Failures block hosted claim closeout

title: Expose read-only SDK CLI MCP client posture labels
rationale: Clients must not launder read-plane access into gateway authority or mutation capability.
acceptance: Clients are read-only by default
Output labels authority class mutation none gateway authority not held raw access disabled unavailable or configured
Clients cannot bypass reader authorization
